enhancements.name: Glass Card
enhancements.description: X2 Mult when scored; 1-in-4 chance to destroy itself

enhancements.name: Steel Card
enhancements.description: X1.5 Mult while this card stays in hand

enhancements.name: Gold Card
enhancements.description: Earn $3 if this card is held in hand at end of round

enhancements.name: Lucky Card
enhancements.description: 1-in-5 chance for +20 Mult; 1-in-15 chance to earn $20
